title: Fix virtual interface null assignments and comparisons (#5974)

features.name: virtual interface null assignment
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface variable assigned the null value
features.snippet:
virtual interface bus_iface va;
initial va = null;

features.name: virtual interface null inequality comparison
features.description: Code should include an inequality comparison between a virtual interface variable and null
features.snippet:
virtual interface bus_iface va;
if (va != null) begin end
